title: Vango Camping LED Lantern — 360° Illumination
short_description: Atmospheric LED camping lantern with 360° light. Dimmable, hangable, and long battery life. Perfect for cozy evenings.
long_description: The Vango LED camping lantern provides ambient light throughout the campsite. The 360° illumination brightens the entire table, and the dimming mode adjusts the brightness perfectly. With a hanging hook, it can be placed flexibly—inside the tent, on a tree, or under a sunshade. The long battery life lasts for several evenings.
buying_angle: Especially appealing for campers who value practical features in lamps: 360° illumination, dimmable, hanging hook.
